scores.notes: OCR output matches ground truth very closely with no misspellings or wrong characters. Numeric data including dates are exact. No tables present in source, so structure is preserved by default. Layout and reading order are maintained well, with section headings and lists intact. Minor differences include omission of the initial header lines (EX-19.1 2 exhibit191.htm EXHIBIT 19.1 Exhibit 19.1 and 'Page 1'), which slightly impacts completeness and layout scores.
